speaker: MATT
raw_text: There is nothing to find purchase for, here. It's just a pit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a pair of pants hanging off his eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You finish restraining him with the chains. Who's doing what?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's just casting, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I guess you can help me out?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to inspire her, somehow.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to encourage success.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to inspire her with a song.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to see if I see anything more than just spikes down in the hole.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth-- Oh, never mind. Can anybody make it look like there's a big feast in front of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24? You do see what looks like some sort of mild glimmer of metal that amongst all the rest of the weapons and armor that have been destroyed down there, one seems to have resisted the age, that has stayed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a plain old 50-foot rope. I'm going to try to tie it to something on the edge.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, back to the game at hand. You all, after an evening of taking turns resting the best you can, nothing catches your eye, although occasionally you see a little bit of movement, very slow movement just outside of your main light radius along the edge of the top of the pit you guys slept in. Just kind of fade in and out, something just drifted away. Eventually you all come to. Your Fomorian friend is just sitting there in a very unfriendly, aggressively passive manner, just staring at the rest of the group. Expectantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back!

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Good game. Good game, bro.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we hit 3,000 on the break! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's impressive! You guys are awesome! So to enter in the giveaway you just have to be active in the chatroom. It could be as simple as just posting: 'I love Zac, he's great!' That's all you have to write.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or Vex. Whoever.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Or other people in the show, it's fine, whatever. So just be active in the chat room. I'm going to go! I'm going to let these guys do their thing. I don't want to give you guys any more interruptions until the show is over, so enjoy. Just watch the chat room for giveaways! Thank you!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, so you make your way to here. You kneel down with the Bad News. You aim for one of the weak points of the metal, bent and ruined from the swinging of the platform. You grabbed that horn, Grog.
trigger_phrase: you make your way to here

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, weird question. (laughs) All right, we've got a giant spiral machine hanging by two chains right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to peek over the edge. And is there a way that if I happen to snap one of those chains that that thing would go slamming into him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Very possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pull over and make that shot. I'm going to steady myself, sit down, and I'm going to make that shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Bad News aimed up. You're aiming-- You're probably going to have to move around to this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which is very careful, around the two of them-- Oh, actually, you'd probably go around this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I go around the other way.
